---
title: "Introduction"
---

The purpose of this book is to provide the reader with a brief introduction to the concept of discrete modulus along with the accompanying Python modulus code.

## Resources {.unnumbered}

- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/nathan-albin/discrete-modulus)
  - [Book source](https://github.com/nathan-albin/discrete-modulus/tree/main/book)
  - [Python modulus code](https://github.com/nathan-albin/discrete-modulus/tree/main/python/src/discrete_modulus)
- [Python API reference](reference/python/)

## Acknowledgments {.unnumbered}

This material is based upon work supported by the National Science Foundation under:

- [Grant No. 1515810](https://www.nsf.gov/awardsearch/showAward?AWD_ID=1515810)
- [Grant No. 2154032](https://www.nsf.gov/awardsearch/show-award?AWD_ID=2154032)
